name: IoTJobExponentialRolloutRate
description: Contains information about an exponential rollout rate for a configuration deployment job.

allOf.description: The minimum number of devices that receive a pending job notification, per minute, when the job starts. This parameter defines the initial rollout rate of the job.

The exponential factor to increase the rollout rate for the job.

This parameter supports up to one digit after the decimal (for example, you can specify 1.5, but not 1.55).
The criteria to increase the rollout rate for the job.
